response.justification: The resume is wildly inflated with misleading job titles and fabricated employment (e.g., 'Founder, Datadog' — a real company; 'Staff Software Engineer at Stripe' — highly improbable for an entry-level role), and lacks credible alignment with the job’s renewable energy/construction tech focus, while overstating experience and misrepresenting timeline (current role starting in 2025). The candidate appears to be fabricating credentials, undermining trust.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript and Node.js
Strong open-source contributions and technical writing
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks
concerns: Fabricated employment at Stripe and Shopify (impossible timeline)
Misrepresentation as founder of Datadog (real company)
No evidence of renewable energy, construction tech, or PostgreSQL experience
